title: Squirrel Removal in SoHo, Manhattan | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in SoHo, Manhattan. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair for lofts and historic buildings. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: SoHo's iconic cast-iron buildings and converted lofts provide unexpected entry points for squirrels seeking warm nesting spaces in attics and wall cavities. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive squirrel removal services tailored to SoHo's unique architectural landscape, from West Broadway to Greene Street. Our humane removal methods protect both your property and the wildlife while ensuring squirrels don't return.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has extensive experience working with SoHo's historic buildings and understands the delicate balance between effective pest control and preservation requirements. Our licensed technicians use humane, eco-friendly methods that comply with NYC regulations while providing lasting solutions for your loft, gallery space, or commercial property.
localContext: SoHo's 19th-century cast-iron architecture and large open loft spaces create unique challenges for squirrel intrusions, particularly along rooflines and fire escapes common throughout the neighborhood. From Prince Street to Grand Street, our team is familiar with the building codes and landmark regulations that govern pest control work in this historic district.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels common in SoHo buildings?
faqs.answer: SoHo's cast-iron buildings and converted lofts often have gaps in rooflines, cornices, and around fire escapes that provide easy access for squirrels. The mature trees along streets like Wooster and Thompson also support healthy squirrel populations that seek shelter in nearby buildings during colder months.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in SoHo?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in SoHo typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, building height, and extent of damage repair needed. Historic building considerations and landmark regulations may affect the final cost.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal safe for historic SoHo buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, our technicians are trained to work with SoHo's historic architecture and follow all Landmarks Preservation Commission guidelines. We use non-invasive exclusion methods and carefully match any repairs to your building's original materials and aesthetic to maintain its historic integrity.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my SoHo loft?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in SoHo are completed within 3-7 days, including humane trapping, exclusion work, and sealing entry points. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations, and we offer flexible scheduling to accommodate both residential loft owners and commercial properties in the neighborhood.
